events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Since the submitted package lacks the quantity takeoff/area count needed to verify scope against the placing drawings, I marked the checkpoint `needs_more_info` (not pass/fail) — the photos show no observed defects, but completion percentage and full ACI 318/117 compliance can't be confirmed without that baseline data.
